web.title: Expose port to docker container (Connection refused) - Stack Overflow
web.description: The Prometheus container must be able to reach Docker host port 9100, which is binded on localhost on docker host.

web.title: Prometheus scrape job cannot reach the metrics - Discourse Meta
web.description: When configuring Prometheus job so that it would scrape the metrics, using an internal IP, I can only see server returned HTTP status 404 Not Found.

web.title: Error reading Prometheus: Post "http://localhost:9090/api/v1/query ...
